quality.description_clarity: High. Clearly defines the dome's size, duration, creatures allowed, and protective properties.

mechanics.core_effect: Creates a stationary, 10-foot-radius dome of force.
limitations: Capacity: Caster + 9 Medium or smaller creatures.
Blocks all matter, spells, and magical effects from passing through.
mechanics.utility_notes: Excellent defensive/rest utility due to complete magical and physical barrier, suitable for long rests or secure encampments. Ritual tag increases utility.

suggestions: None. The spell data is complete and mechanically sound according to standard reference formats.
